game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Hitman Sniper:** Players assume the role of Agent 47, positioned at a fixed sniper nest overlooking a multi-story compound, using tap-and-drag gestures to aim their sniper scope, pinching to zoom, and tapping to fire. The core mechanic involves identifying and eliminating primary targets and secondary objectives within a mission's time limit (e.g., 5 minutes), utilizing environmental interactions like shooting explosive barrels or dropping objects to create silent kills. Successful eliminations and stealthy takedowns contribute to a score multiplier, while detection by guards or failure to eliminate primary targets results in immediate mission failure. Progression is driven by earning cash and weapon parts from completed missions, which are used to unlock and upgrade 17 unique sniper rifles, each possessing distinct stats for damage, zoom, and stability. An additional "Death Valley" mode challenges players with wave-based zombie survival, emphasizing precision and speed against increasing enemy numbers.
game_info.description: You are Agent 47, the world's deadliest sniper. Eliminate high-value targets from your fixed vantage point overlooking a secure compound. Use precision aim and environmental kills to complete objectives before time runs out. Stay undetected—if guards spot you, the mission fails. Score multipliers reward stealth and accuracy. Complete missions to unlock better weapons and tackle the zombie survival mode.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move crosshair/scope aim
Space: Fire weapon
Shift: Toggle zoom (2x/4x magnification)
Z: Reload weapon
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen (from game over)
ENTER: Start game (from start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and shooting mechanics test. Validates that the player can move the crosshair, zoom, and fire the weapon. Tests basic collision detection and entity interaction.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move crosshair around the screen systematically. Toggle zoom at regular intervals. Fire at various locations to test weapon mechanics. Reload when ammunition is low.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Crosshair moves smoothly in response to arrow key inputs. Zoom toggles correctly. Weapon fires and depletes ammunition. Reload functionality works. No crashes or errors occur during basic operations.

TEST_1.expected: Crosshair moves smoothly in response to arrow key inputs. Zoom toggles correctly. Weapon fires and depletes ammunition. Reload functionality works. No crashes or errors occur during basic operations.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test using optimal strategy. Tests ability to identify and eliminate primary targets efficiently while maintaining stealth and maximizing score through environmental kills.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Quickly locate primary targets (marked in red). Prioritize headshots for instant kills. Use environmental hazards when targets are nearby. Maintain zoom for accuracy. Eliminate all primary targets before time expires while avoiding detection.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All primary targets are eliminated successfully. Mission completes with GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score reflects successful eliminations and stealth bonuses. Time remains on the clock. No detection alerts triggered.

TEST_3.test_description: Movement pattern and target tracking test. Validates AI behavior, patrol patterns, and the ability to track moving targets effectively.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Observe and track moving guards. Test leading shots on moving targets. Verify that targets follow patrol patterns. Test shooting at different movement states (walking, stopping, turning).
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Guards patrol predictably. Moving targets can be hit with proper leading. Hit detection works for targets in motion. AI behavior is consistent and challenging but fair.
TEST_3.description: Movement pattern and target tracking test. Validates AI behavior, patrol patterns, and the ability to track moving targets effectively.
TEST_3.strategy: Observe and track moving guards. Test leading shots on moving targets. Verify that targets follow patrol patterns. Test shooting at different movement states (walking, stopping, turning).
TEST_3.expected: Guards patrol predictably. Moving targets can be hit with proper leading. Hit detection works for targets in motion. AI behavior is consistent and challenging but fair.

TEST_4.test_description: Environmental interaction test. Validates explosive barrels, physics-based kills, and environmental hazard mechanics.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Identify explosive barrels and environmental hazards. Position to shoot barrels when targets are nearby. Test chain reactions and area-of-effect damage. Verify score bonuses for environmental kills.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Explosive barrels detonate when shot. Nearby targets take damage or are eliminated. Environmental kills award bonus points. Multiple targets can be eliminated with single environmental interaction.
TEST_4.description: Environmental interaction test. Validates explosive barrels, physics-based kills, and environmental hazard mechanics.

TEST_5.test_description: Detection and stealth mechanics test. Validates alert system, detection triggers, and mission failure conditions.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Test various detection scenarios: missing shots near guards, body discovery, rapid non-silent kills. Verify alert levels escalate appropriately. Test mission failure when fully detected.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Guards react to nearby gunshots. Alert level increases with suspicious activity. Full detection results in mission failure. Stealth gameplay is rewarded with higher scores and lower alert levels.
